title: Building reliable RAG services in production
content: RAG pipelines need observability, retrieval quality control, and fallback strategies to avoid hallucination regressions.

title: Kubernetes cluster upgrades without downtime
content: This guide covers canary node pools, workload disruption budgets, and rollout verification checkpoints.

title: React state orchestration with event-driven UI
content: A practical pattern for reducing UI coupling by emitting domain events and subscribing in narrow view components.
